title: Kūt-e ‘Abdollāh Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kūt-e ‘Abdollāh with a Z-Score of +4.74. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Kūt-e ‘Abdollāh has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 15.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 18%, and wind speed is moderate at 13.6 km/h. 
 These conditions will persist, causing severe discomfort and health risks to the local population.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
